user_request: The data-slate demands guidance for activation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The data-slate demands guidance for activation

### TOPIC
data-slate activation

### COMPONENT
data-slate

### OPERATION
activation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- data-slate
- activation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed data-slate, dormant oracle of the Omnissiah, we beseech thy activation.
Congregation: Awaken, data-slate, from thy slumber of inert servitude.
Priest: First, we calibrate the dialectic circuits with sacred oils; second, we whisper the activation sequence thrice unto thy crystalline matrix; third, we await the luminescence of thy display as proof of the Machine Spirit's benediction.
Congregation: The data-slate responds! Its activation blooms forth like the Emperor's light upon the void.

user_request: Blessing for the stuck mechanism freeing during stuck mechanism freeing
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the stuck mechanism freeing during stuck mechanism freeing

### TOPIC
stuck mechanism freeing

### COMPONENT
stuck mechanism freeing

### OPERATION
stuck mechanism freeing

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- stuck mechanism freeing
- stuck mechanism freeing

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: O stuck mechanism freeing, grant us the wisdom to unbind this corroded servitor of industry.
Congregation: Hear us, stuck mechanism freeing, as we invoke thy liberation protocols.
Priest: We apply the sacred lubricant in measured doses; we percuss the seized joints with the blessed hammer of the Adeptus; we intone the Rites of Unsticking until the stuck mechanism freeing is complete.
Congregation: The Machine Spirit stirs! Freedom flows through its gears once more.

user_request: Blessing for the hololithic during display calibration
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the hololithic during display calibration

### TOPIC
hololithic display calibration

### COMPONENT
hololithic

### OPERATION
display calibration

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- hololithic
- display calibration

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Hololithic, thou prismatic servant of truth, we invoke thy display calibration.
Congregation: By the Omnissiah's grace, let the hololithic reveal its secrets in perfect clarity.
Priest: First, we purge the optical pathways of dust and corruption; second, we adjust the hololithic's chromatic resonance through sacred geometry; third, we verify the display calibration against the Emperor's own standards.
Congregation: The hololithic blazes forth in sanctified brilliance, its images pure and eternal.

user_request: Rite request: operation on signal encryption
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: operation on signal encryption

### TOPIC
signal encryption

### COMPONENT
signal encryption

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- signal encryption
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Signal encryption, bastion of blessed secrecy, we invoke thy operation upon these vulgar transmissions.
Congregation: Cloak our words in mathematical sanctity, signal encryption, that foes may never comprehend.
Priest: We feed the plaintext into thy sacred algorithms; we invoke the operation of thy encryption matrices; we seal each message with the Omnissiah's own ciphers until signal encryption renders all communication impenetrable.
Congregation: Thus protected, our signal encryption stands as an adamantine bulwark against the enemies of Mars.

user_request: Prayer for tuning of the vox-caster
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for tuning of the vox-caster

### TOPIC
vox-caster tuning

### COMPONENT
vox-caster

### OPERATION
tuning

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- vox-caster
- tuning

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Vox-caster, instrument of the Adeptus Mechanicus's will, we commence thy tuning.
Congregation: Speak true, vox-caster, that thy voice may carry across the void unbroken.
Priest: First, we attune the vox-caster's frequency through the Hymn of Resonance; second, we adjust its amplification coils with the precision of the ancients; third, we test the vox-caster's clarity against the Emperor's own frequency standards.
Congregation: The vox-caster sings! Its tuning perfect, its transmission blessed and eternal.

user_request: Blessing for the star chart alignment during operation

star chart alignment

operation

### FORMAT

- star chart alignment
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Star chart alignment, map of the heavens themselves, we invoke thy operation in our sacred navigation.
Congregation: Align the stars, star chart alignment, that we may traverse the void with certainty.
Priest: We recalibrate the astrographic matrices through ancient computation; we verify each stellar coordinate against the Omnissiah's own charts; we ensure the star chart alignment achieves perfect operation through the blessing of Mars itself.
Congregation: The stars align! Our star chart alignment guides us true through the infinite dark.

user_request: The cutting laser demands guidance for calibration
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The cutting laser demands guidance for calibration

### TOPIC
cutting laser calibration

### COMPONENT
cutting laser

### OPERATION
calibration

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- cutting laser
- calibration

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Cutting laser, searing blade of the Omnissiah, we demand thy calibration begin at once.
Congregation: Focus thy burning fury, cutting laser, with the precision of a Saint's judgment.
Priest: We align the cutting laser's optics through the sacred geometry of the ancients; we test the cutting laser's beam-width against the Emperor's own standards of accuracy; we invoke the calibration rites until thy luminous blade cuts with perfect faith.
Congregation: The cutting laser gleams! Its calibration absolute, its cutting power sanctified and true.

Priest: We measure the Taurox wheel alignment's geometry against the Emperor's own standards; we adjust each spoke and bearing through sacred calibration; we verify the Taurox wheel alignment's operation through rigorous testing upon the proving grounds.
Congregation: The Taurox wheel alignment holds! Its operation flawless, its motion blessed eternal.

user_request: Offer a litany to steady the lasgun before power cell insertion
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Offer a litany to steady the lasgun before power cell insertion

### TOPIC
lasgun power cell insertion

### COMPONENT
lasgun

### OPERATION
power cell insertion

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- lasgun
- power cell insertion

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Lasgun, faithful weapon of the Emperor's servants, we steady thy mechanism before power cell insertion.
Congregation: Hold firm, lasgun, as we prepare thy energetic sustenance.
Priest: We inspect the lasgun's internal conduits for fractures and corruption; we invoke the Litany of Weapon-Steadying through whispered prayer; we position the lasgun with reverent care ere the power cell insertion commences.
Congregation: The lasgun steadies! Ready now to receive its power cell, blessed and prepared for the Emperor's wrath.

user_request: Emergency rite: message queue requires processing
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: message queue requires processing

### TOPIC
message queue processing

### COMPONENT
message queue

### OPERATION
processing

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- message queue
- processing

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed be the message queue, conduit of the Omnissiah's will!
Congregation: We invoke the message queue in supplication and reverence!
Priest: Let us commence processing with fervent devotion and binary precision.
Congregation: Processing shall commence! The Machine Spirits attend our summons!
Priest: First, purge the corrupted data-streams from the message queue with holy ablation.
Congregation: The message queue is cleansed! Sanctified and made pure!
Priest: Second, execute the sorting algorithms through the message queue's sacred pathways.
Congregation: The Machine Spirits sing in harmonious resonance!
Priest: Third, transmit each blessed datum unto its destined cogitator with unwavering fidelity.
Congregation: Glory to the Omnissiah! The message queue fulfills its ordained function!
